Operation.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[defName="AEXP_Beagle" or defName="AEXP_Chihuahua" or defName="AEXP_Corgi" or defName="AEXP_FrenchBulldog" or defName="AEXP_GermanShepherd" or defName="AEXP_GreatDane" or defName="AEXP_Poodle" or defName="AEXP_Pug" or defName="AEXP_Rottweiler" or defName="AEXP_Shih-Tzu" or defName="AEXP_WelshTerrier"]/race/useMeatFrom

match.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[defName="AEXP_Beagle" or defName="AEXP_Chihuahua" or defName="AEXP_Corgi" or defName="AEXP_FrenchBulldog" or defName="AEXP_GermanShepherd" or defName="AEXP_GreatDane" or defName="AEXP_Poodle" or defName="AEXP_Pug" or defName="AEXP_Rottweiler" or defName="AEXP_Shih-Tzu" or defName="AEXP_WelshTerrier"]/race/useMeatFrom

nomatch.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[defName="AEXP_Beagle" or defName="AEXP_Chihuahua" or defName="AEXP_Corgi" or defName="AEXP_FrenchBulldog" or defName="AEXP_GermanShepherd" or defName="AEXP_GreatDane" or defName="AEXP_Poodle" or defName="AEXP_Pug" or defName="AEXP_Rottweiler" or defName="AEXP_Shih-Tzu" or defName="AEXP_WelshTerrier"]/race
